steps.title: Identify what makes this work unusual
steps.content: The passage describes “True History” as featuring science fiction hallmarks (space travel, interplanetary conflict) and recognized as the genre's earliest known work — despite being written in the second century, centuries before science fiction as a genre would formally emerge.

steps.title: Match meaning to choices
steps.content:
”Visionary” means demonstrating forward-thinking imagination and anticipating future developments — which perfectly describes a work that contained science fiction elements centuries before the genre formally existed.

The other three choices don't address this forward-looking quality: they focus on approval, relevance, or tone instead.

That matches choice D — D is correct.
